name: Embracing Imperfection: Simulating Students with Diverse Cognitive Levels Using LLM-based Agents
venue: Proceedings of the 63rd Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 1: Long Papers)
summary: ACL 2025 paper proposing a training-free LLM-based student simulation framework that builds cognitive prototypes from past learning records and uses beam-search self-refinement to simulate imperfect Python programming solutions across diverse cognitive levels.

access_attempts.notes: Used abstract, methodology, experimental analysis, conclusion, limitations, and ethics sections for extraction.
